company_context: PXM Platform | Salsify Product Experience Management Salsify Network Webinar: Key Connections for 2026 Success → March 17th | 11:00 AM ET Connect Here Contact Careers Customers Support Customer Hub Customer Blog Customer Success Knowledge Base Login PXM LOGIN SXM LOGIN What Is PXM? What Is PXM? PXM for Brands Lead the digital shelf with Product Experience Management (PXM). PXM for Retailers Source supplier product content efficiently and at scale with PXM. PXM and AI Transform digital commerce strategy with AI-powered solutions. What Is the Digital Shelf? Learn about the digital shelf, including strategies for winning sales. How (and How Much) Will AI Change Shopping Rob Gonzalez, Salsify co-founder & CMO, explains the shift to chat-based discovery and how brands can prepare. Solutions For Brands Centralize Centralize all your product content, no matter where it lives. Connect Connect across the digital shelf to deliver engaging product experiences. Automate Automate manual processes to improve efficiency and accuracy. For Retailers Onboard Accelerate your retail suppliers and product data onboarding. Validate Ensure up-to-date product data is always available to your customers. Automate Gain the freedom to scale your business with automation. Products PXM Product Experience Management PIM Manage all product content in one central system of record. Syndication Easily syndicate product content to every consumer touch point. Enhanced Content Enrich product pages with below-the-fold content and rich media. Intelligence Suite Bring AI-powered capabilities directly into your Salsify workflows. Grocery Accelerator Leverage the first-ever category-wide PXM accelerator in the grocery industry. GDSN Data Pool Synchronize standard supply chain, marketing, and ecommerce attributes globally. Digital Shelf Analytics Continuously optimize your organization’s product content syndication. Catalog Sites Share secure, on-brand, and always up-to-date digital product catalogs. Automation and AI Automate business processes and enhance Salsify workflows with AI. PXM Platform, Integrations, and APIs Integrate the PXM platform with the rest of your enterprise systems architecture. SXM Supplier Experience Management Supplier Onboarding Accelerate supplier onboarding while ensuring your schema requirements are met. Product Listing Sell products faster with Product Listing. Content Enrichment Increase online conversions with Content Enrichment. Automation Save time and increase operational efficiency with retail automation. SXM Platform, Integrations, and APIs Integrate the SXM platform with the rest of your enterprise systems architecture. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex, and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their product content management. I came across your company, Salsify, and was impressed with your work in Product Experience Management. Can you tell me a little bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) Honestly, we're not really looking for any new solutions right now. We've got our own systems in place, and I'm not sure we need another data processing tool. Plus, I've heard of similar solutions from competitors like Akeneo and Pimcore. What makes DeepData AI so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your skepticism, and I appreciate your honesty. What sets us apart is our AI-powered capabilities that enable real-time data processing and automation. We've worked with several companies in the PXM space, and our solution has helped them reduce manual errors by up to 30% and increase efficiency by 25%. I'd love to discuss how our solution can address specific pain points you might be experiencing.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still skeptical) That sounds interesting, but we're on a tight budget, and I'm not sure we can afford another expensive solution. Our CFO is always breathing down my neck about costs. How does your pricing compare to what we're currently paying for our existing solutions?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget is a concern. Our pricing is actually very competitive, and we offer customized plans based on the specific needs of our clients. In fact, we've helped several companies reduce their overall data processing costs by up to 20% after implementing our solution. I'd be happy to provide a detailed pricing breakdown and ROI analysis to help you make an informed decision.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (somewhat convinced) Okay, I'll admit that sounds promising. But how does your solution integrate with our existing systems, like our PIM and syndication tools? We can't afford to disrupt our current workflows.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our solution is designed to be highly integratable, and we've worked with several companies to ensure seamless integration with their existing systems. We can provide APIs, webhooks, or even custom integrations to ensure that our solution works smoothly with your current tools. I'd be happy to set up a demo to show you exactly how it works and answer any technical questions you may have.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo. I want to see how this can work with our existing systems and understand the potential ROI. Can you send over some availability, and we'll schedule something for next week?

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller could have further emphasized the unique value proposition and ROI analysis earlier in the conversation to more effectively address the buyer's initial skepticism and budget concerns. Sentiment: Neutral
